## Table 2 — Ablation results

<!-- One row per ablated variant. Same task columns as main comparison.                   -->
<!-- Each row must link to the ablation schedule in the experiment plan.                  -->

**Table ID:** TABLE-ABL
**Claim IDs covered:** [e.g., C-004, C-005]
**Ablation components from plan:**
- [ ] Component A: [name]
- [ ] Component B: [name]
- [ ] Component C: [name]

|---------|--------|--------|--------|-----|---|-----------|-------------|
| Full model (Ours) | | | | | | — | PASS |
| w/o component A | | | | | | A1 | PASS |
| w/o component B | | | | | | A2 | PASS |
| Size-matched (no attn) | | | | | | A3 | PASS |

**Consistency notes:**

## Claim-evidence index

<!-- This section is the authoritative link between numbers and claims.                  -->
<!-- Used by Writer-Critic for INV-9 checks and by Claim-Tracker --stage B.             -->

| Claim ID | Claim (short) | Evidence table | Key number | Status | INV-9 lock |
|---------|---------------|---------------|-----------|--------|------------|
| C-001 | Main SR (Ours) | TABLE-MAIN row Ours, Avg col | [value] | SUPPORTED | [value] |
| C-002 | Superiority over B1 | TABLE-MAIN rows Ours vs B1 | [delta] | SUPPORTED | [delta] |
| C-003 | Ablation: component A | TABLE-ABL rows Full vs w/o A | [delta] | SUPPORTED | [delta] |

**INV-9 lock**: once a number appears here, it must match the manuscript exactly. Any
discrepancy between draft text and this column is a CRITICAL INV-9 violation.
